text:
This is the year that you’re finally going to make your resolutions into reality.

I know it because I’ve seen people who swore nothing worked finally succeed - over and over. 

You don’t need a better resolution. You need a better support system. You need to be able to turn off your brain and show up.

You need the Pump Club.

We are the only app that will give you half of your money back just for completing a program. 

We are the only app that gives you weekly coaching calls, nutrition and fitness programs, habit building, and a supportive community for one price.

And we are the only app that gives you a free membership when you lose your job.

We aren’t different just to be different. We are different because it works.

Join us at the link in my bio.

The Arnold Classic is raising the bar. I’m raising the prize money once again because our athletes deserve it.

I want to thank the bodybuilders, the strength athletes, and especially the fans. You make all of this possible. We could not have the biggest fitness expo and the best bodybuilding show in the world without you.

You are my inspiration.

They told you it was your fault.

That you just weren’t disciplined enough.

That you needed another hack, another trend, to be “optimized,” or buy the latest magic pill. 

That’s the lie influencers sell you—short-term fixes and toxic advice that never sticks.

That ends today.

Get the Pump App at the link in our bio today. Don’t wait.

No finish line. Just showing up again tomorrow. 

This week wasn’t about being perfect. It was about finding the daily win, dropping the excuse that you need the “right time” to commit, and moving anyway. 

If you showed up this week in any way, drop DONE below. If you didn’t, tell us why. 

Monday is three days away. 

FULL BREAKDOWN IN TODAYS NEWSLETTER.

Arnold’s Pump Club is pulling up across the street from Gold’s Gym Venice with @live.momentous for a smoothie pop-up. 

Come by, grab a smoothie and join the positive corner of the Internet. 

4/20-4/22 7:00AM-2:00PM DAILY 

LINK IN BIO 

#arnoldspumpclub #momentous #venicebeach #fitnesscommunity #positivity

Most people train for a finish line.

Arnold is 78. Still training. Still showing up every single day.

Not because of a goal. Not because of a number on a scale or a summer or a wedding.

Because no matter what’s going on — no matter what’s weighing on him — he gets a win every single day.

That’s the real secret. Not the program. Not the supplement. The daily win.

Stop looking for the finish line. Start collecting wins.

What’s yours today? Drop it below. 👇

#wintheday #vision #mondaymotivation #mindsetmatters #fitnes

The Power of NO.

On Monday, you made three commitments:

1. Write your vision down.
2. Say no to one distraction.
3. Move every single day.

The week is over. Did you follow through?

If you did: drop DONE in the comments. Just the word. That is enough.

If life got in the way: tell us what happened. No shame. That is not what this place is about. 

Monday is 3 days away. See you then.

#vision #fridayfuel #pumpclub #accountability #fridaycheckin

Every tradition this week tells the same story. Different rituals, one truth:

You are never past the point of beginning again.

Roland couldn’t do a single push-up. Now he benches. Cholesterol normalized. Fatty liver gone.

Susan lost her husband. Gained the weight. Built a 16-week streak. This morning she fit into pants she hasn’t worn in 5 years.

Dan had gastric bypass and lost almost all his muscle. Started from zero. 15 pounds of muscle and 7.5% body fat later — his doctor loves it.

None of them waited for the right moment. They drew a line and started.

What’s yours? Drop it in the comments. Then tap the link in bio for Arnold’s full breakdown and your free trial.

#mondaymotivation #beginagain #fitness #motivation #vision

Acceptance isn’t weakness. It’s the starting line.

Carl Rogers spent his life studying human growth and landed on something most people spend years fighting: you can’t change what you won’t acknowledge.

In the gym, in your health, in your life, the people who make the most progress aren’t the ones who hate where they are. They’re the ones who look at it clearly, accept it as their starting point, and get to work.

Stop fighting yourself. Start from where you are.

What’s one thing you’re ready to accept this week so you can move forward? Drop it below. 👇

#weeklywisdom #pumpclub #mindset #mentalstrength #fitness

You committed on Monday. Now it’s time to find out.

Did you write your vision down? Did you say no to one distraction? Did you move your body every single day?

No judgment either way. This community isn’t built on perfection. It’s built on honesty and showing up again.

Drop one word below. DONE if you showed up. Or tell us what got in the way. 

Monday is right around the corner.

Your story is being written one week at a time. 👇

#fitness #accountability #mindsetmatters #showup #community

Columbus showed up! 

Arnold Classic weekend at the Pump Club Lounge was full of energy, community, great conversations, and people choosing to get better together.

To everyone who came by, trained with us, listened in, and made the weekend special, thank you.

This is what showing up every day looks like in real life. 💪💪

#ArnoldClassic #ColumbusOhio #FitnessCommunity #ShowUpEveryDay

#fitnessmotivation bettertoday arnoldclassic showup community
